data.name: AuthRequestUnreadable
data.value: OpenIddict request could not be read.

data.name: AuthPasswordGrantOnly
data.value: Only the password grant is supported.

data.name: AuthSecondFactorRequired
data.value: An access token cannot be issued for this network until second-factor verification is completed.

data.name: BootstrapCompleted
data.value: Setup is already completed. The existing municipality record should be used.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorDetail
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing the request.

data.name: ValidationDetail
data.value: The submitted request could not be validated.

data.name: TenantContextRequiredDetail
data.value: The request must include a valid tenant claim or X-Tenant-Id header.

data.name: TenantMismatchDetail
data.value: The tenant in the route must match the tenant resolved for the current request.
